## Story Implementation

**Story**: #[number] - [title]
**Type**: feature | bugfix | refactor | docs
**Priority**: high | medium | low

### 📋 Story Reference
- **Backlog Link**: [Link to story in backlog]
- **Acceptance Criteria**: [List key acceptance criteria being addressed]

### 🚀 Implementation Summary
<!-- Brief description of what was implemented -->

### ✅ Acceptance Criteria Checklist
<!-- Copy acceptance criteria from story and check off completed items -->
- [ ] Functional requirement 1
- [ ] Functional requirement 2
- [ ] Non-functional requirement (performance/security/scale)

### 🧪 Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated (>80% coverage)
- [ ] Integration tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] E2E tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] All tests pass locally

### 📊 Performance
- [ ] API response time: < 300ms p99
- [ ] Database queries optimized
- [ ] Memory usage acceptable
- [ ] No performance regressions
- [ ] Load testing completed (if applicable)

### 🔒 Security
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] SQL injection prevention
- [ ] XSS protection
- [ ] Authentication/authorization correct
- [ ] Security review completed
- [ ] No sensitive data in logs

### 📚 Documentation
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Code comments added
- [ ] Migration guide (if breaking changes)

### 🏗️ Infrastructure
- [ ] Database migrations included
- [ ] Environment variables documented
- [ ] Configuration updated
- [ ] Deployment notes provided

### 📈 Metrics & Monitoring
- [ ] Logging implemented
- [ ] Metrics added
- [ ] Alerts configured (if needed)
- [ ] Health checks updated

### 🔄 Dependencies
- [ ] New dependencies justified
- [ ] Security scan passed
- [ ] License compatibility checked
- [ ] Package.json/requirements.txt updated

### 🧹 Code Quality
- [ ] Code follows style guidelines
- [ ] Linting passes
- [ ] Type checking passes
- [ ] No code duplication
- [ ] Error handling comprehensive

### 📱 Cross-Platform
- [ ] Works on all supported browsers (Chrome extension)
- [ ] Mobile responsive (web components)
- [ ] API compatibility maintained

### 🎯 Viral Growth Features
<!-- For features that support viral growth -->
- [ ] Sharing functionality implemented
- [ ] SEO optimization included
- [ ] Analytics tracking added
- [ ] Attribution system integrated

### 🔗 Related Issues
<!-- Link any related issues or dependencies -->
- Closes #[issue-number]
- Depends on #[issue-number]
- Related to #[issue-number]

### 🖼️ Screenshots/Demo
<!-- Add screenshots, GIFs, or demo links if applicable -->

### 🚨 Breaking Changes
<!-- List any breaking changes and migration steps -->
- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] Breaking changes documented with migration guide

### 📝 Additional Notes
<!-- Any additional context, decisions, or notes for reviewers -->

### 🔍 Review Checklist (for reviewers)
- [ ] Code review completed
- [ ] Tests reviewed and adequate
- [ ] Performance impact assessed
- [ ] Security implications considered
- [ ] Documentation quality verified
- [ ] Breaking changes approved

---

**Definition of Done:**
- [ ] All acceptance criteria met
- [ ] Tests pass with >80% coverage
- [ ] Performance requirements met
- [ ] Security review completed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Ready for deployment
